items.headline: Meta must pay $375 million for violating New Mexico law in child exploitation case, jury rules
items.summary: Jury reaches a verdict in New Mexico trial in which the state's attorney general alleged that Meta failed to safeguard its family of apps from child predators.

items.headline: David Blitzer and Blackstone-backed group snaps up Indian cricket franchise for $1.8 billion

items.summary: President Donald Trump had endorsed fellow Republican Jon Maples in the special election against Emily Gregory, the Democratic nominee.

items.headline: Oil prices fall, stock futures climb on reports U.S. has proposed a cease-fire to Iran
items.summary: Global oil prices tumbled and U.S. stock futures rose on Tuesday evening following reports that the U.S., via intermediary Pakistan, had sent Iran a 15-point plan to end the conflict in the Middle East, now in its fourth week.

items.headline: Meta makes 'big bet' on top leaders with stock options as pressure builds to catch up in AI

items.headline: South Korea stocks jump 3%, leading regional gains as Trump comments signal Iran war de-escalation

items.summary: Machado's remarks come as the oil industry remains hesitant to invest in Venezuela after the U.S. ousted former President Nicolas Maduro.
